Interface IRasterStatistics2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control raster statistics.

[Guid("DC667A54-7969-4486-AA5A-F7EC40D4B707")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterStatistics2 : IRasterStatistics

Properties

Covariances

Array of doubles, the covariances with the n bands of the raster.

object Covariances { get; set; }

object
